situational_context: Early rebuild phase with return-to-running protocol active (week 1, run #1 on May 3 successful — 2.47 km, no pain reported). Chronic load rising steadily (17.8→23.3 since Apr 19 bootstrap). ACWR at 0.65, below safe zone — structural drop after May 1 outlier (load 55) fell off the 7-day window. Weight trending down meaningfully: 106.9→104.1 kg over 3 weeks (~0.9 kg/week, approaching the 1 kg/week caution threshold from return-to-running protocol). RHR improved from 53→49 bpm. Life context stable with infant (Léonie, ~16 months); training constrained by 2-3 sur site days per week with eBike commutes. Training mix: eBike commutes on sur site days, gravel rides, and first return-to-running session.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Retour running #2 OU Endurance vélo Z2
Récupération active Z1-Z2 vélo — post sur site
Endurance vélo Z2 ou Gravel Z2

recommendations.text: Execute return-to-running #2 tomorrow (Sat May 9): 20-25 min Z1-Z2, max 3 km, soft surface (Bois de Vincennes). Abort if any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibia). This is the gating session for week 2 progression.
recommendations.measurable: Run completed ≤25 min, avg HR ≤145, no pain reported within 24h post-run

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake to ≥140g consistently. Current 7d average is 127g against a 150g target. At 104 kg during a rebuild with return-to-running impact loading, protein adequacy supports tendon collagen synthesis and muscle preservation. Add a protein-rich snack post-training.
recommendations.measurable: Protein ≥140g on ≥5 of 7 days next week

recommendations.text: Maintain consistent training rhythm to rebuild ACWR into safe zone (0.8-1.3). Target ≥3 dedicated sessions plus sur-site commute loads. Avoid single-session load spikes >25.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Must stay <1 kg/week averaged over any 2-week window
markers_to_watch.reason: Return-to-running protocol: rapid weight loss compromises tendon adaptation, especially at 104 kg with Achilles/patellar risk

markers_to_watch.threshold: Zero localized pain lasting >24h after run #2 (May 9)
markers_to_watch.reason: Return-to-running protocol week 1: any tissue complaint → abort running, substitute cycling
Below 0.8 since May 1 outlier dropped off; consistent training should restore ratio
